description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy, using the Hugo Docker image ghcr.io/gohugoio/hugo:v0.147.9 (empty entrypoint) for site building and the cyb3rjak3/html5validator:pypi-v4.2.1 and ghcr.io/untitaker/hyperlink:0.2.0 images for testing. In the build stage add a build_site job that runs git config --global --add safe.directory $CI_PROJECT_DIR, npm install, and hugo, sets HUGO_CACHEDIR='' and HUGO_ENV=production variables, and stores the generated public directory as an artifact. In the test stage add an html5validator job that executes tests/html_validate_test using the html5validator image, and a hyperlinkcheck job that runs hyperlink --sources content/en --check-anchors public/ using the hyperlink image. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs the same three build commands, then finds all .htm/.html/.txt/.text/.js/.css/.json files in public and gzips them with gzip --best -f -k, sets the same Hugo variables, publishes the public folder as a GitLab Pages artifact, runs only on the main branch, and uses a production resource_group.
